productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Brown Formal Shoe
description: With a sleek finish and fine construction, these handcrafted derby shoes from franco leone add an elegant finishing touch to a formal outfit.UpperLeather upper with a diamond-textured design for absolute comfort and styleLace-up system for a snug, customised FitPointed toe design for absolute styleInner lining for sweat-free all-day comfortLeather footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole for durabilityTPR raised heel textured on the backfoot for absolute ergonomic comfort and gripshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
